data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Spotify encrypts data in transit to protect user privacy and data integrity.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2 with strong cipher suites ensures secure communications.

data.title: Authentication Protocols
data.description: Two-factor authentication and OAuth 2.0 methods are used to secure user logins.
data.technical_spec: JWT tokens for validation and authentication sessions.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits are conducted to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Employs both in-house and third-party security tools for testing.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Spotify has a structured incident response strategy to tackle potential breaches.
data.technical_spec: Real-time monitoring and dedicated incident response teams.

data.title: Data Privacy Compliance
data.description: Spotify complies with global data privacy laws including GDPR and CCPA.
data.technical_spec: User consent management and data protection controls.
